use_cases: Display scannable QR codes for sharing website URLs or links
Generate QR codes for mobile app deep links in marketing materials
Show QR codes for payment links or digital business cards
Provide authentication codes via QR in two-factor setups
Embed scannable links in print collateral for offline-to-online conversion
ai_summary: A lightweight QR code display component from Ark UI that renders a scannable QR code pattern encoding a URL or text value. Features basic dark mode support with minimal styling including a white/dark background, border, and rounded corners. Designed for embedding scannable links into any application interface.
